item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Have some science.
item.description:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=01cKJB2HOjc https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Triboluminescence
Explosive hydroforming a steel sphere. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Explosive_forming
Parhelion visible in a valley between mountains https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sun_dog
Gradient-index optics https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gradient-index_optics https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rnNjV3fh-4M
Femur of Triceratops on left versus femur of African Elephant on right https://www.rom.on.ca/people/shino-sugimoto Fossil preparator?, Vertebrate Palaeontology Technician? at Royal Ontario Museum
Parker Solar Probe. The first one to touch the sun. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Parker_Solar_Probe https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c80TzqNoqMg
Fresnel Lens, from an old giant tv. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fresnel_lens Could not find the source; only link I found claiming to be source was down/removed.
The first simulated image of a black hole, calculated with an IBM 7040 computer using 1960 punch cards and hand-plotted by French astrophysicist Jean-Pierre Luminet in 1978. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jean-Pierre_Luminet
Schlieren Optics visualizing airflow https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mLp_rSBzteI https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Schlieren_photography
Floating an iron anvil in mercury. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f5U63IGmy6Q

item.title: You forgot this.
item.dc:creator: countervail247365

item.title: Why use ai to make a meme? This took less than five minutes.
item.description: Threw this together in less than five minutes in response to a shitty AI generated meme on reddit. https://www.reddit.com/r/PoliticalMemes/comments/1l72qa8/what_invaders_look_like/ OP made a shitty post. I made it better. Images taken from https://www.nytimes.com/2019/04/03/business/economy/immigration-labor-economy.html and https://www.americanspecialops.com/photos/view.php?i=/images/photos/law-enforcement/ICE-SWAT-hr.jpg&r=/photos/law-enforcement/ice-special-response-team.php AI is completely unnecessary for making memes or image macros. I could have made this one better if I actually tried, but the point stands.
item.dc:creator: rmx256

item.title: To anyone who has ever been in this situation... You are strong and amazing to survive, I know as someone who has both fawned and froze it can feel like we should have fought back, but it's not to, surviving is enough!!

item.title: Orders are clear
item.description:
If you are National Guard or Active Duty military and you are being ordered to violate the Constitutional rights of US citizens then this is the number to the Gl Rights Hotline. There is support, you don't have to go through with it. tel:1-877-447-4487
Remember we serve the Constitution for the preservation of our democracy. The protection of the American people, American hopefuls, and our continued sovereignty. Remember we do not follow illegal orders. It is illegal for us to operate against the United States citizens. We are not to invade our own country
item.dc:creator: JustGridSquares

item.title: Late Sunday dump of amazing things. Enjoy !
item.description:
Excellent use of free will..... ( girls are slower ...)
Expanded metal machine
Firefighting with drones.
An amazing spice rack
Tricycles have sure gotten advanced.
Cookie Cutters Machine (sorry for the music. I wanted to keep the machine sound).
A tree is burning inside after lightning strike
A smart way to move house in Brussels
A River Of Rocks. I didn't even knew this may exist ...
Incredible strength and balance. Some blondes are really great !
Making of Silver Varq
Perfect illusion
Perfectly cut tree.
The art of paper cutting
Using only a scalpel and glass, this artist creates stunning pet portraits.
Peeling Ivy from brick home
never prepping for paint any other OK there's an idea, but not sure it gains time or makes it easier ...
This... relaxes me. Don't put your ...
Double ninja kitchen knives.
Evolution of BMW
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: Swedish government abandons Greta Thunberg. Israel illegally kidnapped her and 11 others in international waters, and are currently being held prisoners.
item.description:
Link to tweet: https://x.com/EyeonPalestine/status/1932165436969468308
Link to article: https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/gaza-bound-aid-boat-with-greta-thunberg-on-board-arrives-in-israel-after-its-seizure Keep in mind that she was kidnapped at gunpoint in international waters and is now being held prisoner at this moment. No laws were broken except by Israeli forces. And the Swedish government doesn't have the gall to say anything against Israel, not even for their own citizens.
item.dc:creator: WarmMachineDD7

item.title: Pride Month Manga Monday: "I Was Born the Wrong Sex!" (series; ch. 01)
item.description:
Author: Konishi Mafuyu. Read right to left
Nice and informative series about the reassignment surgery process. New manga posted every Monday More LGBT+ manga https://imgur.com/gallery/CCaPPxw

item.title: Absolutely
item.description: I have spent my entire adult life watching liberals run past 1000 conservative evils just so they can publicly criticize a fellow liberal for the slightest infraction. Meanwhile conservatives have damn near codified the illegality of criticizing fellow conservatives. Guess what? Mitch McConnell is both evil and unfuckable. But they only listen to the unfuckable part because that's the part that hurts them. They don't care if they are stupid or evil. They care about being unfuckable.

item.title: America is dumb as shit, this has all be telegraphed
item.description: Trump’s former Sec. Def. Mark Esper: “[Trump] was suggesting that...we should bring in the troops and shoot the protesters.” Q: “The commander-in-chief was suggesting that the U.S. military shoot protesters?” Esper: “Yes, in the streets of our nation’s capital.” (May 2022)

item.dc:creator: bohund

item.title: Reminder on cops
item.description: Rickia Young was making a k turn to leave an area, under police instructions, when police swarmed her vehicle. Dragged her out of the vehicle, beat her, took her kid for a photo op and just fucked her life up. This is the photo and post those cops made with her child. This was in 2020. We will be getting a lot of propaganda so keep this shit in mind. Cops lie. The establishment lies to protect the powerful and cruel. 2M payout from an over inflated police budget so they don't care. I think at least one person was eventually fired, a while later. That's it. Gang violence and child abduction for propaganda and that's it. https://www.nbcphiladelphia.com/news/local/philly-pays-2m-to-mom-who-was-beaten-by-police-during-unrest/2958402/
item.dc:creator: TalkingSnake

item.title: “The great companies did not know that the line between hunger and anger is a thin line. And money that might have gone to wages went for gas, for guns, for agents and spies, for blacklists, for drilling.”― John Steinbeck, The Grapes of Wrath

item.title: What Happened Today #129
item.description: ? The collision is coming fast. Protests erupted on Sunday from Los Angeles to San Francisco while Trump threatens military force and the Insurrection Act. In six days, US Army tanks roll through Washington for his birthday parade on the exact same day as the "No Kings" rallies, while his economic wrecking ball bill picks up speed to crush working families. Don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of GovBrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/travel-ban-begins 2. https://go.govbrief.today/la-riots-intensify 3. https://go.govbrief.today/san-francisco-protests 4. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-military-leaders-riots 5. https://go.govbrief.today/army-terror-graffiti 6. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-allows-cpb-firings 7. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-cyber-order 8. https://go.govbrief.today/abc-suspends-moran Yesterday's Top Story - https://go.govbrief.today/newsom-threatens-taxes Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/pride-march-worldpride Free & Private Subscription - https://govbrief.today IMGUR Reminder: I've been blocked from chat, but I don't know if it's a deliberate Imgur action. You can find me everywhere else if you need to communicate privately. I always use my real name as my handle.
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Natalie Reynolds was banned from TikTok for deceiving a mentally ill homeless woman into jumping into a lake, by promising her $20.00, and then running away when she could not swim.
